heading: Omitted
label: 704 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , which revoked corporate charter of Confederated Tribes of Grand Ronde Community of Oregon and provided for termination of Federal power with regard to tribe, was omitted in view of Federal recognition and restoration of corporate charter of Confederated Tribes of Grand Ronde Community of Oregon by former .act Aug. 13, 1954, ch. 733, § 1468 Stat. 727section 713b of this title
